subcodes.first_line: O divine Providence! From the Kingdom of mysteries, send Thine aid and confirmation upon these righteous ones in quick succession
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين ابرار را از ملکوت اسرار پی در پی تأييد و توفيق فرست
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
